response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly aligns with the role's AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates architecture, scalability, and TDD/craftsmanship practices across multiple senior roles.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React with senior-level depth
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Polyglot background (Java, C++, Python-adjacent) and strong testing/TDD discipline
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Cloud experience focused on AWS; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
